overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive school management system for Indian schools, covering Students, Fees, Attendance, HR/Payroll, Academics, Examinations, Transport, Library, Inventory, Communication, Chat, Certificates, Reports, and more. Runs on cPanel/PHP/MySQL — no Internet Computer deployment required. All data saves reliably to MySQL with local-first sync so records never disappear.
features: 25+ modules: Students, Fees, Attendance, HR, Academics, Exams, Transport, Library, Inventory, Chat, Reports
Local-first sync: saves to browser instantly, syncs to MySQL in background
Role-based access: Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Accountant, Parent, Student, Driver
Indian class ordering: Nursery → LKG → UKG → Class 1–12
10 color themes, dark navy sidebar, all menu names visible
PWA installable on Android and iOS
Changelog: every add/edit/delete logged with user and timestamp
Auto-migration: visit /api/?route=migrate/run once to create all MySQL tables
No spinner arrows on any amount fields — all plain text inputs
